name: ASUS ROG STRIX Z790-E GAMING WIFI ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 2x PCIe 4.0 x16 - Support DDR5-7800+(OC) - 5x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen2x2 Type-C - Thunderbolt (USB4) Header - HDMI 2.1 - DP 1.4 - Intel 2.5Gb LAN - 802.11ax Wi-Fi 6E
shortName: ASUS ROG STRIX Z790-E GAMING WIFI ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700
description: ATX Z790 ROG gaming motherboard for Intel LGA 1700 socket with DDR5, PCIe 5.0, and WiFi 6E.
